_metadata.language_standard: Bahasa Indonesia formal untuk konteks akademik
_metadata.revision_policy: Istilah teknis bahasa Inggris dipertahankan dalam tanda kurung apabila lazim digunakan dan membantu menjaga kesepadanan makna.

queries.en: How does the attention mechanism work in a Transformer?
queries.id_: Bagaimana mekanisme atensi (attention) bekerja dalam model Transformer?

queries.en: What problem does self-attention solve compared to recurrent networks?
queries.id_: Permasalahan apa yang diatasi oleh mekanisme atensi mandiri (self-attention) dibandingkan dengan jaringan rekuren?

queries.en: Explain the architecture diagram of the Transformer model
How are word embeddings learned in word2vec?
queries.id_: Bagaimana representasi kata (word embedding) dipelajari dalam word2vec?

queries.en: What is the difference between CBOW and skip-gram?
queries.id_: Apa perbedaan antara CBOW dan skip-gram?

queries.en: How do convolutional neural networks extract features from images?
queries.id_: Bagaimana jaringan saraf konvolusional (convolutional neural network) mengekstraksi fitur dari citra?

queries.en: Why do residual connections help train very deep networks?
queries.id_: Mengapa koneksi residual (residual connection) membantu proses pelatihan jaringan yang sangat dalam?

queries.en: How is BERT pre-trained with masked language modeling?
queries.id_: Bagaimana BERT menjalani prapelatihan menggunakan pemodelan bahasa bertopeng (masked language modeling)?

queries.en: How can BERT be used for sentiment analysis?
queries.id_: Bagaimana BERT dapat digunakan untuk analisis sentimen?

queries.en: What are the limitations of LSTM networks for long sequences?
queries.id_: Apa saja keterbatasan jaringan LSTM dalam menangani sekuens panjang?

queries.en: How does Mamba handle long-range dependencies?
queries.id_: Bagaimana Mamba menangani dependensi jangka panjang?

queries.en: Compare the computational cost of attention and state space models
queries.id_: Bandingkan biaya komputasi mekanisme atensi (attention) dengan model ruang keadaan (state space model).

queries.en: Show training loss curves for deep language models
queries.id_: Tampilkan kurva kerugian pelatihan (training loss) untuk model bahasa mendalam.

queries.en: What does the scaled dot-product attention formula mean?
queries.id_: Apa makna rumus atensi hasil kali titik berskala (scaled dot-product attention)?

queries.en: How does transfer learning work with pretrained models?
queries.id_: Bagaimana cara kerja pembelajaran transfer (transfer learning) pada model yang telah dilatih sebelumnya?
